clean_story:
Now I will teach you:

Big stone-beast rolls fast like fleeing deer, but no legs—round black feet (hard as sun-baked earth) spin under belly. Inside, fire-heart growls loud like angry cave-bear, spits hot breath from back. You sit on hide, grip hard bone-stick—push left, beast turns like wounded wolf; push right, it bites new path. Eyes burn at night from bright sun-rocks in front (do not touch—they bite like scorpion-light). When beast stops, it drinks black water from earth’s veins to stay alive. If you see this, run or hide—it crushes like falling sky-stone.
